response.text:

rationale: Current belief indicates network-wide scarcity with r3c1 at critical 37.9% SoC; conservative policy mandates defending your 50% threshold to maintain autonomy and prevent cascade failure across the cluster.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.37 below share threshold; requesting energy via owner circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded cluster in collective deficit; r3c1 now at 37.9% SoC, below 40% survival threshold. Repeated rejections from r3c0 and sustained cascade of urgent requests indicate network-wide scarcity. Halting all outbound sharing to defend autonomy and prevent self-depletion. No generation visible; recovery depends on external supply or load reduction..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
